calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar May-02-2003 Vacated

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-01-2003 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for hearing this day.
Commissioner: Sue M. Kaplan, Clerks: S. Ravinantapricha/P. Dias, CSR: Leticia Perez.
Plaintiff: San Francisco Housing Authority representative property manager, Ally Hays present with counsel, Arnold Evje, II. Defendant: Thelma Mugrace present in pro per.
Counsel and parties met in chambers, case settled by oral stipulation and read into the record as follows: Plaintiff is entitled to a judgment against the defendant for restitution and possession of the premises lacated at 1537 Sunnydale Ave., San Francisco, CA.
Forfeiture of the rental agreement from 10-1-02 to 5-31-03, writ of possession, no stay for any reason. Defendant will be allowed to remain in possession of the premises subject to the following conditions. Back rent for the sum of $1,118.00, with the first payment of $845.00 due on or before May 5,2003, balance of $273.00 in installments of $100.00 due on or before 6-1-03, 7-1-03 and $73.00 by 8-1-03. Any money received by plaintiff will be applied first to current rent of $215.oo per month and then toward the above terms.
Plaintiff to repair the leaking in master bedroom, weather strip, wall, stove and hood, kitchen sink, pest control, install door-bell with sound and light within the next 6 months.
If defendant complies with the terms, plaintiff will dismiss the action with prejudice. If defendant fail to do so, plaintiff may seeks ex parte declaration, with 24 hours notice to defendant to have judgment entered.
Defendant waives any right to make motion to set aside or vacate the judgment, or to apply for a stay or relief from forfeiture.
Parties agreed to terms.
